instruction:
Let $f \! \in\! L ( [ a, b ] )$, and define $g ( x ) = f ( x ) \! \int_{a}^{x} \! f ( t ) \mathrm{d} t$. What is the value of $I$?

Options:
A. $$
\int_{a}^{b} f ( x ) \cdot x \bigg( \int_{a}^{x} f ( t ) \mathrm{d} t \bigg) \mathrm{d} x
$$
B. $$
\bigg(\int_{a}^{b} x \bigg( f ( x ) \bigg) \mathrm{d} x \bigg)^{2}
$$
C. $$
\frac{1} {3} \bigg( \int_{a}^{b} f ( x ) \mathrm{d} x \bigg)^{3}
$$
D. $$
\int_{a}^{b} \bigg( f ( x ) \bigg)^{2} \mathrm{d} x
$$
E. $$
\int_{a}^{b} \bigg( f ( x ) \int_{a}^{b} f ( t ) \mathrm{d} t \bigg) \mathrm{d} x
$$
F. $$
\frac{1} {2} \bigg( \int_{a}^{b} f ( x ) \mathrm{d} x \bigg)^{2}
$$
G. $$
\frac{1} {4} \bigg( \int_{a}^{b} f ( x ) \int_{a}^{x} f ( t ) \mathrm{d} t \bigg)
$$
H. $$
\int_{a}^{b} f ( x ) \bigg( \int_{a}^{x} f ( t ) \mathrm{d} t \bigg) \mathrm{d} x
$$
I. $$
\frac{1} {2} \bigg( \int_{a}^{b} \big( x \cdot f ( x ) \big) \mathrm{d} x \bigg)
$$
J. $$
\bigg(\int_{a}^{b} \bigg( f ( x ) \int_{a}^{x} f ( t ) \mathrm{d} t \bigg) \mathrm{d} x \bigg)
$$
